bib-verify.name: bib-verify
bib-verify.description: Verify the paper's bibliography against OpenAlex. Catches hallucinated, mistitled, or wrong-year citations before the paper ships. Runs `code/utils/bib_verify/verify_bib.sh` and writes a triage report to `output/bib_verification.md`. Use after paper-writer drafts, after any referee round that changes citations, and before Stage 10 marks the pipeline complete.
